goal: Build a barcode-scanner SKU-based lane divert station: items travel on a main conveyor, a barcode_reader_sensor reads the SKU label on each passing item, and the item is diverted by a Franka arm into one of three lane bins (LaneA, LaneB, LaneC) according to a SKU routing table. SKU_A → LaneA, SKU_B → LaneB; any unrecognised SKU falls through to LaneC (catch-all). Exercises barcode_reader_sensor, semantic-label routing, and 3-destination sort pattern without vision-classifier dependency. ONET-adjacent: postal/distribution-centre sorter variant.
thoughts:
Design rationale for CP-NEW-barcode-scanner-divert:

1) Barcode sensor as routing oracle: barcode_reader_sensor scans each item as it passes under the sensor head and returns a SKU string. The handler maps SKU → destination via a color_routing-style dict (routing_axis='label'). Items with unrecognised SKU get no routing match and fall through to destination_path = LaneC — the same fall-through mechanism as CP-18 inspect-reject, but driven by a barcode sensor rather than semantic class pre-tagging. This is the canonical exemplar for sensor-driven sort (vs vision-driven sort in CP-34).

2) Structural difference from existing sort templates: CP-34 uses camera + vision classifier (color → bin). CP-18 uses pre-tagged semantic class with fall-through. This template introduces barcode_reader_sensor as the detection modality — a distinct sensor API that returns a string label rather than a colour class. The sort criterion is a SKU code read from a physical label, which is the dominant routing mechanism in real distribution centres.

3) Scene geometry: Franka Panda on 0.75m table at [0,0,0.75]. Conveyor at y=+0.40, top surface z=0.805. Items (0.05m cubes) have centre z=0.855. Barcode sensor head mounted at [0.10, 0.40, 0.92] pointing down — passes above items as they approach the pick zone. Proximity sensor at [0.40, 0.40, 0.855] triggers pick. Three lane bins at y=-0.40: LaneA at x=-0.35, LaneB at x=0.0, LaneC at x=+0.35. All within Franka 0.85m reach envelope.

4) SKU distribution: 6 items total — 2× SKU_A (orange), 2× SKU_B (cyan), 2× SKU_C (yellow, unrecognised → catch-all LaneC). Items spaced 0.30m apart on belt at x = [-1.5, -1.2, -0.9, -0.6, -0.3, 0.0]. Belt velocity 0.15 m/s gives ~2s per item at pick zone. set_semantic_label assigns sku_a/sku_b/sku_c labels so the barcode sensor can read them deterministically in simulation.

5) Physics: CPU dynamics (enable_gpu_dynamics=False, broadphase_type=MBP) for determinism. Rubber material on all items prevents sliding. sleepThreshold=0.0 ensures items remain active through settle. Item mass default 0.5 kg.

6) Function-gate: verify that SKU_A items arrive in LaneA. simulate_args cube_path=/World/Item_1 (SKU_A), target_path=/World/LaneA, duration_s=200. The 200s budget accommodates 6 items at ~30s each (pick + travel + place cycle).
code:
# ── Scene skeleton ────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
create_prim(prim_path="/World/DomeLight", prim_type="DomeLight")
set_attribute(prim_path="/World/DomeLight", attr_name="inputs:intensity", value=1000.0)
create_prim(prim_path="/World/Ground", prim_type="Cube", position=[0, 0, -0.5], scale=[20, 20, 1])
apply_api_schema(prim_path="/World/Ground", schema_name="PhysicsCollisionAPI")
create_prim(prim_path="/World/Cell", prim_type="Xform")

# Robot base table
create_prim(prim_path="/World/Table", prim_type="Cube", position=[0, 0, 0.375], scale=[0.6, 0.5, 0.375])
apply_api_schema(prim_path="/World/Table", schema_name="PhysicsCollisionAPI")

# ── Physics: CPU determinism ──────────────────────────────────────────────────
set_physics_scene_config(config={"enable_gpu_dynamics": False, "broadphase_type": "MBP"})

# ── Franka Panda ──────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
robot_wizard(
    robot_name="franka_panda",
    dest_path="/World/Franka",
    position=[0, 0, 0.75],
    orientation=[0.7071068, 0, 0, 0.7071068],
)

# ── Main conveyor — 3m, 0.15 m/s ─────────────────────────────────────────────
# belt top z = 0.78 + 0.025 = 0.805
create_conveyor(
    prim_path="/World/MainBelt",
    position=[0.0, 0.40, 0.78],
    size=[3.0, 0.35, 0.05],
    surface_velocity=[0.15, 0, 0],
)

# ── Materials for 3 SKU types ─────────────────────────────────────────────────
create_material(material_path="/World/Materials/Orange", shader_type="OmniPBR",
                diffuse_color=[1.0, 0.45, 0.0])
create_material(material_path="/World/Materials/Cyan",   shader_type="OmniPBR",
                diffuse_color=[0.0, 0.85, 0.85])
create_material(material_path="/World/Materials/Yellow", shader_type="OmniPBR",
                diffuse_color=[0.95, 0.90, 0.0])

# ── 6 items: 2× SKU_A (orange), 2× SKU_B (cyan), 2× SKU_C/unrouted (yellow) ─
# item centre z = belt_top(0.805) + item_size/2(0.025) = 0.855
# spacing 0.30m; belt velocity 0.15 m/s → ~2s gap between items at pick zone
item_specs = [
    ("/World/Item_1", -1.50, "sku_a", "/World/Materials/Orange"),
    ("/World/Item_2", -1.20, "sku_b", "/World/Materials/Cyan"),
    ("/World/Item_3", -0.90, "sku_c", "/World/Materials/Yellow"),
    ("/World/Item_4", -0.60, "sku_a", "/World/Materials/Orange"),
    ("/World/Item_5", -0.30, "sku_b", "/World/Materials/Cyan"),
    ("/World/Item_6",  0.00, "sku_c", "/World/Materials/Yellow"),
]

item_paths = [spec[0] for spec in item_specs]

for path, x, sku, mat in item_specs:
    create_prim(prim_path=path, prim_type="Cube",
                position=[x, 0.40, 0.855], size=0.05)
    for api in ("PhysicsRigidBodyAPI", "PhysicsCollisionAPI",
                "PhysicsMassAPI", "PhysxRigidBodyAPI"):
        apply_api_schema(prim_path=path, schema_name=api)
    assign_material(prim_path=path, material_path=mat)
    # Semantic label = the SKU string the barcode sensor will read
    set_semantic_label(prim_path=path, class_name=sku, semantic_type="label")

bulk_set_attribute(
    prim_paths=item_paths,
    attr="physics:mass",
    value=0.5,
)
bulk_set_attribute(
    prim_paths=item_paths,
    attr="physxRigidBody:sleepThreshold",
    value=0.0,
)
for path in item_paths:
    apply_physics_material(prim_path=path, material_name="rubber")

# ── 3 lane destination bins ───────────────────────────────────────────────────
# Arranged at y=-0.40, spread in x so all within Franka 0.85m reach.
# LaneA (SKU_A) left, LaneB (SKU_B) centre, LaneC (catch-all) right.
create_bin(prim_path="/World/LaneA", position=[-0.35, -0.40, 0.75],
           size=[0.22, 0.22, 0.15])
create_bin(prim_path="/World/LaneB", position=[ 0.00, -0.40, 0.75],
           size=[0.22, 0.22, 0.15])
create_bin(prim_path="/World/LaneC", position=[ 0.35, -0.40, 0.75],
           size=[0.22, 0.22, 0.15])

# Visual tint for lane bins
assign_material(prim_path="/World/LaneA", material_path="/World/Materials/Orange")
assign_material(prim_path="/World/LaneB", material_path="/World/Materials/Cyan")
assign_material(prim_path="/World/LaneC", material_path="/World/Materials/Yellow")

# ── Barcode reader sensor ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────
# Mounted above belt, between infeed and pick zone — items pass under it.
# Reads semantic_type='label' from each item as it crosses.
barcode_reader_sensor(
    sensor_path="/World/BarcodeScanner",
    position=[0.10, 0.40, 0.92],
    scan_volume=[0.10, 0.35, 0.12],
    read_attribute="semantic_type:label",
)

# ── Pick proximity sensor ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────
add_proximity_sensor(
    sensor_path="/World/PickSensor",
    position=[0.40, 0.40, 0.855],
    size=[0.07, 0.07, 0.07],
)

# ── Franka pick-place controller with SKU routing ─────────────────────────────
# color_routing keys match the semantic label (sku_a, sku_b) read by barcode.
# sku_c has no routing entry → falls through to destination_path = LaneC.
setup_pick_place_controller(
    robot_path="/World/Franka",
    target_source="curobo",
    sensor_path="/World/PickSensor",
    belt_path="/World/MainBelt",
    source_paths=item_paths,
    destination_path="/World/LaneC",
    color_routing={
        "sku_a": "/World/LaneA",
        "sku_b": "/World/LaneB",
    },
    drop_target=[ 0.35, -0.40, 0.92],
    planning_obstacles=["/World/Table", "/World/MainBelt",
                        "/World/LaneA", "/World/LaneB", "/World/LaneC"],
)
failure_modes: Barcode sensor scan_volume too small — if item passes at edge of scan volume the sensor returns None, item loses its routing entry and falls through to LaneC incorrectly. Widen scan_volume y-extent to cover full belt width (0.35m here).

semantic_type mismatch — barcode_reader_sensor reads 'semantic_type:label' but set_semantic_label was called with semantic_type='class'. Ensure semantic_type='label' is passed consistently in both calls.

SKU_C items should reach LaneC via fall-through; if sku_c is accidentally added to color_routing it gets an explicit destination and the catch-all pattern is lost. Never add the catch-all SKU to the routing table.

Belt velocity + pick sensor timing conflict — at 0.15 m/s the barcode scanner at x=0.10 reads items ~2s before the pick sensor at x=0.40 fires. If belt is faster than 0.3 m/s the scan may fire after pick; keep belt at ≤0.20 m/s.

Franka reach to LaneA at x=-0.35 — horizontal distance from base ≈ sqrt(0.35^2+0.40^2) = 0.53m. Within 0.85m reach, but wrist orientation must avoid Table collision. Add '/World/Table' to planning_obstacles (already present).
code_template:
# ── Scene skeleton ────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
create_prim(prim_path="/World/DomeLight", prim_type="DomeLight")
set_attribute(prim_path="/World/DomeLight", attr_name="inputs:intensity", value=1000.0)
create_prim(prim_path="/World/Ground", prim_type="Cube", position=[0, 0, -0.5], scale=[20, 20, 1])
apply_api_schema(prim_path="/World/Ground", schema_name="PhysicsCollisionAPI")
create_prim(prim_path="/World/Cell", prim_type="Xform")

create_prim(prim_path="/World/Table", prim_type="Cube", position=[0, 0, 0.375], scale=[0.6, 0.5, 0.375])
apply_api_schema(prim_path="/World/Table", schema_name="PhysicsCollisionAPI")

set_physics_scene_config(config={"enable_gpu_dynamics": False, "broadphase_type": "MBP"})

robot_wizard(
    robot_name={{primary_robot.class}},
    dest_path={{primary_robot.path}},
    position={{primary_robot.position}},
    orientation={{primary_robot.orientation}},
)

create_conveyor(
    prim_path={{input_conveyor.path}},
    position={{input_conveyor.position}},
    size={{input_conveyor.size}},
    surface_velocity={{input_conveyor.surface_velocity}},
)

# Materials, items, bins
create_material(material_path="/World/Materials/Orange", shader_type="OmniPBR", diffuse_color=[1.0, 0.45, 0.0])
create_material(material_path="/World/Materials/Cyan",   shader_type="OmniPBR", diffuse_color=[0.0, 0.85, 0.85])
create_material(material_path="/World/Materials/Yellow", shader_type="OmniPBR", diffuse_color=[0.95, 0.90, 0.0])

# Workpieces (role-parameterised)
for item in {{workpieces}}:
    create_prim(prim_path=item['path'], prim_type="Cube", position=item['position'], size=0.05)
    for api in ("PhysicsRigidBodyAPI", "PhysicsCollisionAPI", "PhysicsMassAPI", "PhysxRigidBodyAPI"):
        apply_api_schema(prim_path=item['path'], schema_name=api)
    set_semantic_label(prim_path=item['path'], class_name=item['sku'], semantic_type="label")
bulk_set_attribute(prim_paths=[i['path'] for i in {{workpieces}}], attr="physxRigidBody:sleepThreshold", value=0.0)
for item in {{workpieces}}:
    apply_physics_material(prim_path=item['path'], material_name="rubber")

create_bin(prim_path={{sku_a_destination.path}}, position={{sku_a_destination.position}}, size={{sku_a_destination.size}})
create_bin(prim_path={{sku_b_destination.path}}, position={{sku_b_destination.position}}, size={{sku_b_destination.size}})
create_bin(prim_path={{catchall_destination.path}}, position={{catchall_destination.position}}, size={{catchall_destination.size}})

barcode_reader_sensor(
    sensor_path={{barcode_sensor.path}},
    position={{barcode_sensor.position}},
    scan_volume={{barcode_sensor.scan_volume}},
    read_attribute="semantic_type:label",
)

add_proximity_sensor(sensor_path={{pick_sensor.path}}, position={{pick_sensor.position}}, size={{pick_sensor.size}})

setup_pick_place_controller(
    robot_path={{primary_robot.path}},
    target_source="curobo",
    sensor_path={{pick_sensor.path}},
    belt_path={{input_conveyor.path}},
    source_paths=[i['path'] for i in {{workpieces}}],
    destination_path={{catchall_destination.path}},
    color_routing={
        {{sku_a_destination.routing_key}}: {{sku_a_destination.path}},
        {{sku_b_destination.routing_key}}: {{sku_b_destination.path}},
    },
    planning_obstacles=["/World/Table", {{input_conveyor.path}},
                        {{sku_a_destination.path}}, {{sku_b_destination.path}}, {{catchall_destination.path}}],
)
